name: Cathay Pacific

carryOn.notes: Economy/Premium Economy: 1 bag (7 kg). Business/First: 2 bags (total 15 kg).

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Carry-on only for spare lithium batteries
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Max 100Wh per battery. 101–160Wh with airline approval.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries

faqs.question: What is Cathay Pacific's carry-on weight limit?
faqs.answer: Economy: 7 kg for one bag. Business/First: 2 bags totaling 15 kg.
